title: Heavy Duty Galvanised Metal Link Chain Stainless Steel for Bike Lock Padlock Security Gate Fence Gym Weight Lifting Extra Strong Long Length Welded Metal (4MM, 5 Metre)
features: For Heavy Duty Jobs - This Heavy Duty Chain is made of highest standard DIN 763 Toughened steel and Galvanised with zinc coating to make it rust and corrision proof. Please choose right strength of the chain according to your need. For example 5mm chain is much stronger then 3mm chain.

Rust and corrosion resistant - It is electro Galvanised with zinc coating. This zinc coating on top of steel makes it rust and corrosion resistant to last without rust for much longer enhancing chains overall strength and life.

For Indoor and Outdoor use - Use it indoor or outdoor without any worries. It is electro galvanized to stay rust free then ordinary available chains. It is made of Top grade DIN 763 Metal. Galvanized with zinc coating also make it scratch resistant and its just perfect to use outdoor in wet weather.

Several Uses - Chain can be used for many things for example Securing gates and fences, Locking Bikes and motorcyles, Anchoring Boats, As pet dog leash, Towing car, Hanging Swing, Lamps, Chandellier, Hammock and for gym equiment and all other veriety of uses as per the need.

Bigger Links - Suitable to bigger locks and bolts. Link Dimension are mentioned in the Pictures. Please choose the right chain strength (in MM) and length (in Metres) carefully to suit your need. Full year WARRANTY to give you peace of mind.
description: Heavy Duty Galvanized Steel Chain - Please note - Different lengths and strengths available. Please choose above. ***In "MM" is the thickness of the metal (Diameter of the metal at any given side).*** ***In "Metre" is the total length of the chain.*** Please see pictures for illistruation. Long Lasting Galvanized steel chain for locking the fence, gates, Hanging Swing, securing the bike or any other purpose. Look no further Main Features Why Buy : It is made for heavy duty jobs. Extra strong as made with highest quality DIN 763 steel. Please choose appropriate link width above. Galvanized and shiny : Galvanized and shiny chrome finish. Hot dipped for added strength. For Long Lasting Outdoor Use : Ideal for securing gates, locks, Barn,Fences, Bike lock, Motorcycles etc. Link Dimensions and Maximum Load Capacity For the Chain Diameter 2 mm - Length 14 mm - Width 5 mm - Maximum Load 55 kg Diameter 3 mm - Length 21 mm - Width 8 mm - Maximum Load 75 kg Diameter 4 mm - Length 26 mm - Width 9 mm - Maximum Load 125 kg Diameter 5 mm - Length 28 mm - Width 11 mm - Maximum Load 250 kg Diameter 6 mm - Length 33 mm - Width 13 mm - Maximum Load 350 kg Diameter 7 mm - Length 38 mm - Width 15 mm - Maximum Load 600 kg Diameter 8 mm - Length 42 mm - Width 17 mm - Maximum Load 1150 kg Diameter 10 mm - Length 38 mm - Width 22 mm - Maximum Load 2250kg Warranty : We have 100% MONEY BACK WARRANTY for this item. Buy with confidence. "
